terms_and_conditions_acceptance_text: By using our Services, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to this Agreement and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use the Services.
terms_and_conditions_eligibility_text: You must be at least 18 years old or have reached the legal age of majority in your jurisdiction to use the Services. By using the Services, you represent that you meet this requirement.
terms_and_conditions_responsibilities_te:
• You agree to provide accurate and complete information during registration and to keep your account information updated.
• You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.
• You will not use the Services for unlawful or prohibited activities.
terms_and_conditions_property_text: All content, trademarks, and software associated with the Services are the property of Finture or its licensors and are protected by applicable laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or reproduce any part of the Services without written permission.
terms_and_conditions_termination_text: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the Services at any time, with or without notice, for any reason, including breach of this Agreement.
terms_and_conditions_liability_text: We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising out of your use of the Services.
terms_and_conditions_modifications_text: We may update this Agreement from time to time. Continued use of the Services after changes are made constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.
terms_and_conditions_law_text: This Agreement is governed by the laws of Turkey, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
terms_and_conditions_contact_text: For any questions regarding this Agreement, please contact us at: info@finture.com

kyc_notice: To comply with KYC/AML regulations, we must verify your identity via the NVI system. Your information will not be shared with third parties.
enter_id_details_msg: To get started, please enter the personal details from your ID document.

kvkk_consent: I consent to the processing of my personal data within the scope of the KVKK Information Text.
enter_occupational_info_desc: Please enter your personal and occupational details as registered in official documents.
scan_id_instruction: Use your phone camera to scan both the front and back side of your ID card clearly.
biometric_consent: I consent to the processing of the biometric data relating to my facial image and the personal information on my ID card for identification purposes, in accordance with Article 6 of the Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data.
entered_amount_exceeds_total: The total entered amount exceeds the transaction total.
cannot_add_more_than_10_people: You cannot add more than 10 people.
host_lookup_failed: We couldn't connect to the service. Please try again in a moment.
server_unreachable: We can't reach the service right now. Please try again later.
connection_refused: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
network_unreachable: You're offline. Check your internet connection and try again.
connection_reset: The connection was interrupted. Please try again.
request_timeout: The request timed out. Please try again.
empty_response: No response received from the server.
rate_limited: Too many requests. Please try again later.
kyc_liveness_too_many_faces: Only you should be in frame
kyc_ocr_instruction_front: Place the front of your ID inside the frame
kyc_ocr_instruction_back: Flip your ID and capture the back
kyc_ocr_align: Align the card, avoid glare, and hold steady
kyc_ocr_quality_check: We’ll verify the image quality automatically
kyc_nfc_ready: Ready to scan. Hold your phone steady.
kyc_nfc_hold_steady: Keep the card at the back of your phone until it vibrates.
kyc_nfc_move_card: If nothing happens, move the card slowly around the back.
kyc_nfc_try_again: Couldn't read the chip. Try again and keep the card still.
kyc_prepare_error: An error occurred while preparing the process. If the problem persists, you can contact us.
transaction_not_found: The transaction with the given transactionId not found.
transaction_failed: Transaction status was set to “FAILED”; thus cannot continue with this transaction.
transaction_expired: The transaction is expired thus cannot continue with this transaction.
transaction_completed: The transaction has already been completed; thus cannot continue with this transaction.
internal_server_error: Internal Server error occurred; check server logs.
match_score_threshold_error: Match Score Threshold couldn’t be parsed. Check the request parameters.
liveness_score_threshold_error: Liveness Score Threshold couldn’t be parsed. Check the request parameters.
missing_user_id: UserID wasn’t among the request parameters.
registration_failed: Registration failed; check server logs for more detail.
reference_image_not_found: Reference Image or Registration image not found.
face_not_detected: Couldn’t detect a face in the reference or registration images.
invalid_image_size: The given image size is not appropriate for face recognition.
image_cannot_be_decoded: The given image/s cannot be decoded. Check file type.
face_not_match: The face does not match the reference image.
face_score_below_threshold: Face match score is under the threshold.
registration_timeout: The process timed out before completing registration.
user_registration_incomplete: UserID hasn’t been registered successfully before.
authentication_timeout: The process timed out before completing authentication.
unsupported_document_type: Unsupported document type or document type does not exist in request.
missing_base64_document: Base64 document image does not exist in request.
crop_face_api_failed: Crop face remote API that locates in OCR remote API failed or stopped.
face_image_not_found_or_unextractable: Face image does not exist on the document or cannot be vector extractable.
external_ocr_api_error: External OCR API returned an error and dispatched it to response.
mrz_chip_check_failed: The MRZ chip existence check failed or could not be implemented.
mrz_digit_checksum_failed: The MRZ digit checksum failed or could not be implemented.
image_save_error: An error occurred due to the inability to save images because of an invalid file path or base64 format error.
card_processing_error: An error message caused by problems in card processing, such as inability to extract coordinates.
id_back_side_processing_error: An error message received because the back side of the ID card cannot be processed and some parts of it cannot be detected.
id_front_side_read_error: An error message received because the fields on the front of the ID card cannot be read or extracted completely or it may be a wrong card, etc.
id_number_read_error: An error message received because the identity number field cannot be read correctly on the ID card.
ocr_birthday_or_valid_until_error: An error message received because the birthday or valid until fields cannot be read correctly on the ID Card.
ocr_coordinates_not_extracted_error: An error message due to a problem with the coordinate list because the card coordinates were not extracted correctly.
ocr_fields_reading_error: An error message due to a problem during the OCR reading process of the fields.
hold_id_card_nfc: Hold your ID card against your phone to securely read it via NFC.
place_card_top_front: Place the card at the top front of the device.
place_card_middle_front: Place the card at the middle front of the device.
place_card_bottom_front: Place the card at the bottom front of the device.
place_card_top_back: Place the card at the top back of the device.
place_card_middle_back: Place the card at the middle back of the device.
place_card_bottom_back: Place the card at the bottom back of the device.
nfc_sensor_not_found: Unable to detect the NFC sensor location, please enable NFC from device settings.
permissions_required_for_verification: You must approve the required permissions to complete the verification process.
permissions_access_denied: Access to permissions has been denied.
face_verification_desc: Complete a short liveness check and facial recognition to confirm your identity.
FACE_TOO_CLOSE: You are too close to the camera. Please move back a bit.
FACE_CLOSE_TO_BORDER: Face is too close to the edge. Please center your face in the frame.
FACE_CROPPED: Face is partially cut off. Please ensure your entire face is visible.
FACE_NOT_FOUND: No face detected. Please ensure you are in a well-lit area.
TOO_MANY_FACES: Multiple faces detected. Please ensure only one person is in the frame.
FACE_TOO_SMALL: You are too far from the camera. Please move a bit closer.
FACE_ANGLE_TOO_LARGE: Please look directly at the camera without tilting your head.
FAILED_TO_READ_IMAGE: Unable to process the image. Please try again.
FAILED_TO_WRITE_IMAGE: Error saving the image. Please check your storage and try again.
FAILED_TO_READ_MODEL: Face recognition system failed to initialize. Please restart the app.
FAILED_TO_ALLOCATE: Insufficient memory to process the image. Please close other apps and try again.
INVALID_CONFIG: System configuration error. Please contact support.
NO_SUCH_OBJECT_IN_BUILD: This feature is not supported in your current app version.
FAILED_TO_PREPROCESS_IMAGE_WHILE_PREDICT: Failed to analyze the image. Please try again in better lighting.
FAILED_TO_PREPROCESS_IMAGE_WHILE_DETECT: Face detection failed. Please make sure your face is clearly visible.
FAILED_TO_PREDICT_LANDMARKS: Could not identify facial features. Please remove any masks or glasses and try again.
INVALID_FUSE_MODE: A technical error occurred during processing. Please try again later.
NULLPTR: No image data was received. Please try again.
LICENSE_ERROR: Verification service license error. Please contact support.
INVALID_META: Invalid system metadata provided. Please restart the process.
UNKNOWN: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.
ERR_NFC_READER_NOT_AVAILABLE: NFC is not supported or is unavailable on this device.
ERR_NFC_CREDENTIALS_MISSING: Required document information is missing. Please check the details and try again.
ERR_MISSING_MANDATORY_FIELDS: Invalid document details. Please ensure the Document No, Date of Birth, and Expiry Date are correct.
ERR_BAC_FAILED: Authentication failed. Please verify the document information and try again.
ERR_TAG_LOST: Connection lost. Please keep your document steady against the back of the phone.
ERR_CARD_READING_FAILED: Failed to read the chip. Please try moving the document slightly to find the NFC antenna.
ERR_PROBLEM_OCCURED: An unexpected error occurred during NFC scanning. Please try again.
ERR_CARD_READING_FAILED_SW_0x: Communication error with the document chip. Please try again.
ERR_READING_DG#_FAILED_SW_0x: Error reading document data. Please keep the document steady and try again.
ERR_READING_DG#_FAILED: Could not read personal information from the chip. The signal might have been lost.
ERR_FAILED_TO_CONNECT_SERVER: Server connection failed. Please check your internet connection.
ERR_ACTIVE_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED: Security verification failed. The document chip could not be authenticated.
ERR_PASSIVE_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED: Data integrity check failed. The document data might be unreadable.
ERR_NFC_INVALID_INPUT: Invalid scanning parameters. Please restart the process.
ERR_NFC_PROGRESS_FAILED: NFC process failed. Please try again or contact support.
ERR_TRANSACTION_REQUEST_PARAMS_MISSING: Session error. Please restart the verification process.
ERR_READING_COM_FAILED: Failed to read the document's communication data. Please try again.
ERR_ACTIVE_LIVENESS_GESTURES_NOT_FOUND: Face verification setup is missing. Please restart the app and try again.
ERR_TRANSACTION_ALREADY_COMPLETED: This verification process has already been completed successfully.
ERR_ACTIVE_LIVENESS_REGISTRATION_FAILED: Face recognition failed. Please ensure you are in a well-lit area and follow the instructions carefully.
ERR_INTERNAL_SERVER: We're experiencing technical difficulties on our end. Please try again in a few minutes.
identity_length_invalid: Identity number must consist of 11 digits.
identity_digits_only: Identity number must contain digits only (no letters or symbols).
identity_tenth_rule_failed: Validation rule failed: the 10th digit does not match.
identity_eleventh_rule_failed: Validation rule failed: the 11th digit does not match.
enter_valid_id_number: Please enter a valid ID number
identity_verification_retry: Please check your information and try again. If the problem persists, contact support.
identity_verification_success: Identity verification completed successfully. Thank you!
ERR_OCR_FRONT_IMAGE_NOT_FOUND: Front image of the document is missing. Please capture it again.
ERR_OCR_FRONT_IMAGE_SAVING_FAILED: Failed to process the front image. Please try again.
ERR_OCR_BACK_IMAGE_NOT_FOUND: Back image of the document is missing. Please capture it again.
ERR_OCR_BACK_IMAGE_SAVING_FAILED: Failed to process the back image. Please try again.
ERR_OCR_ID_BACK_PHOTO_FACE_CROP_FAILED: Could not detect a clear face on the document. Please ensure no glare or shadows.
ERR_OCR_ID_ROTATED_BACK_PHOTO_FACE_CROP_: Image processing failed. Please keep the document steady and retake the photo.
ERR_OCR_ID_ROTATED_BACK_PHOTO_SAVE_FAILE: Internal error while saving the document image. Please try again.
ERR_OCR_ID_FRONT_IMAGE_FACE_CROP_FAILED: Face detection failed on the document. Please ensure your face is clearly visible on the ID.
ERR_OCR_CROPPED_FACE_NOT_FOUND_FROM_ID_F: Could not extract your face image from the ID. Please capture a clearer photo.
ERR_FACE_NOT_QUALIFIED: The detected face does not meet the quality requirements. Please try again in better lighting.
ERR_OCR_CROPPED_FACE_SAVING_FAILED: Error processing your face image. Please try again.
ERR_OCR_ID_ROTATED_FRONT_PHOTO_FACE_CROP: Face detection failed due to image rotation. Please hold the ID straight.
ERR_OCR_ID_ROTATED_FRONT_PHOTO_SAVE_FAIL: Failed to save the processed ID image.
ERR_OCR_FACE_IMAGE_NOT_FOUND: Face not recognized. Please ensure the document belongs to you.
ERR_OCR_IMAGE_NOT_FOUND: Image upload failed. Please try capturing the document again.
ERR_JSON_REQUEST_POST_FAILED: Communication error with the server. Please check your internet connection.
ERR_OCR_FACE_NOT_DETECTED: No face detected on the document. Please ensure the photo is clear.
ERR_OCR_FACE_NOT_QUALIFIED: Face image quality is too low. Please use a well-lit environment.
ERR_OCR_IMAGE_NOT_SAVED: System error: could not save the document image.
ERR_OCR_IMAGE_NOT_LOAD: Failed to load the captured image. Please try again.
ERR_OCR_IMAGE_NOT_READ: The document image is unreadable. Please avoid glare on the card.
ERR_OCR_IMAGE_NOT_REMOVED: A temporary processing error occurred. Please restart the session.
ERR_OCR_COORDINATES_NOT_EXTRACTED: Could not locate the document boundaries. Please place the card inside the frame.
ERR_OCR_BACK_NOT_DETECTED: The back of the document was not recognized. Please flip the card and try again.
ERR_OCR_FRONT_NOT_DETECTED: The front of the document was not recognized. Please try again.
ERR_OCR_ROI_OCR_ERROR: Error reading specific fields. Please ensure the card is not covered.
ERR_OCR_SOMETHING_WENT_WRONG: An unknown OCR error occurred. Please try again.
ERR_AI_API_RESPONSE_NOT_PARSABLE: Server returned an invalid response. Please try again later.
ERR_OCR_JSON_RESPONSE_PARSE_FAILED: Processing error. Please retake the document photo.
ERR_OCR_DATE_PARSE_FAILED: Could not read dates from the document. Please ensure they are clearly visible.
ERR_OCR_FAILED_DUE_TO_THRESHOLD: Information on the document is blurry or unreadable. Please capture a high-quality photo.
ERR_OCR_SECURITY_REQUIREMENTS_NOT_SATISF: Document verification failed security checks. Please use an original document.
ERR_MRZ_CHIP_EXISTS_FAILED: This document requires NFC scanning. Please proceed to the NFC step.
ERR_MRZ_DIGIT_CHECKSUM_FAILED: Document data integrity check failed. Please ensure the MRZ area is clean and visible.
ERR_OCR_DRIVER_LICENCE_BACK_PHOTO_FACE_C: Failed to process the back of the driver's license.
name_account_select_currency: Name your account and select the currency to get started.
account_created_success: Your account has been created. You can now start using it for your transactions.
confirm_close_account: Do you want to close this account?
app_permissions_required_hint: You may need to go to the app settings and grant the required permissions to complete this step.
update_mobile_number_hint: Update your mobile number to stay connected and receive important updates from Finture.
number_updated_success: Your mobile number has been updated successfully. You’re all set to receive updates and notifications.
update_address_description: Update your address to make sure your information is always up to date and accurate.
address_updated_description: Your address has been successfully updated. All your future transactions and communications will reflect your new address.
ERR_NFC_NOT_SUPPORTED: NFC is not supported on this device.
company_documents_desc: Upload your official company documents to verify your business identity and ensure regulatory compliance.

delete_document_confirm: Do you want to delete this file?

select_user_roles_desc: Please select the roles you want to assign to the user.
user_created_desc: An invitation has been sent to the user’s email address and mobile number. The user should complete the registration process.
